subject: Continuous Random Variables
question: Let $X$ have the density function given by $f(x) = \begin{cases} 0.2 & -1 < x \le 0 \\ 0.2 + cx & 0 < x \le 1 \\ 0 & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases}$ (a) Find the value of $c$. (b) Find $F(x)$. (c) Find $\Pr(0 \le x \le 0.5)$. (d) Find $E(X)$.
answer: (a) 1.2 (b) The cdf is given by $F(x) = \begin{cases} 0 & x \le -1 \end{cases}$
explanation: Answer: (a) 1.2 (b) The cdf is given by $F(x) = \begin{cases} 0 & x \le -1 \end{cases}$
